title: Allow for timed updates
excerpt: Sometimes I do work late at night (freelance), I don’t want to send an update at 10 pm and have people’s phones ping that they were tagged in an update, but I also don’t want to get up at 9 am and remember to send said u…

posts.author: Emacarin (Elissa Macarin)
posts.cookedHtml: Sometimes I do work late at night (freelance), I don’t want to send an update at 10 pm and have people’s phones ping that they were tagged in an update, but I also don’t want to get up at 9 am and remember to send said update.
